src/ui/adminPanel.ts — game admin dashboard: players, kick, pause/resume, advance turn, rollback

features: Canvas 2D terminal-style renderer with monospace font
12 display modes, 6 highlight modes, fog of war
Full keyboard input: hjkl/arrows, display toggles, commands
REST API + WebSocket client with auto-reconnect
Game lobby with login/register, game browser, create/join
User profile page with stats, password change, notification preferences
Admin dashboard: player management, kick, pause/resume, advance turn, rollback
Invite link generation, management, and landing page (/invite/:code)
Notification bell with unread badge, dropdown, mark-read
Chat system with public/private channels, presence, /commands
End-turn + waiting indicator, font size picker
